name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in UEAS
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Minimal Reproducer

```
// Paste the smallest .ueas source or AST JSON that triggers the bug
```

## Expected Behavior

What the specification says should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened (trap code, panic, incorrect output).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.80.0]
- ANTLR4 version: [e.g. 4.13.2]
- Docker image tag (if applicable): [e.g. ueas-dev:0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
